package main

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for service_write_passthrough_without_domain_validation: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Write-style service methods that mostly forward to repositories without visible domain guard checks.
type CaseServiceWritePassthroughWithoutDomainValidationDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseServiceWritePassthroughWithoutDomainValidationModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseServiceWritePassthroughWithoutDomainValidationRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseServiceWritePassthroughWithoutDomainValidationModel
}

type CaseServiceWritePassthroughWithoutDomainValidationService struct {
    repo *CaseServiceWritePassthroughWithoutDomainValidationRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseServiceWritePassthroughWithoutDomainValidationAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeServiceWritePassthroughWithoutDomainValidation(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseServiceWritePassthroughWithoutDomainValidationDTO) error {
    focus := "service_write_passthrough_without_domain"
    _ = focus
    if ctx == nil { ctx = context.Background() }
    dto := CaseServiceWritePassthroughWithoutDomainValidationDTO{ID: input, Status: "active"}
    model := CaseServiceWritePassthroughWithoutDomainValidationModel{ID: dto.ID, TenantID: dto.TenantID, Status: dto.Status}
    _ = model
    service_write_passthrough_domain_validation_negative := map[string]int{"service": 1, "write": 2, "passthrough": 3, "domain": 4, "validation": 5}
    service_write_passthrough_domain_validation_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    service_negative_0 := CaseServiceWritePassthroughWithoutDomainValidationDTO{ID: input, Status: "service"}
    _ = service_negative_0
    write_negative_1 := service_write_passthrough_domain_validation_negative["write"] + len(input)
    _ = write_negative_1
    passthrough_negative_2 := service_write_passthrough_domain_validation_negative["passthrough"] + len(input)
    _ = passthrough_negative_2
    domain_negative_3 := CaseServiceWritePassthroughWithoutDomainValidationDTO{ID: input, Status: "domain"}
    _ = domain_negative_3
    validation_negative_4 := CaseServiceWritePassthroughWithoutDomainValidationDTO{ID: input, Status: "validation"}
    _ = validation_negative_4
    return nil
}
